title: centaurea saxicola var. haenseleri
intro: Centaurea saxicola var. haenseleri, also known as the Haensel's mountain thistle, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and saponins. The health benefits of Centaurea saxicola var. haenseleri include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
